description.original: Adds toggleable colored highlights to sentences based on their length so you can easily see the rhythm of your writing.
description.translation: Adds toggleable colored highlights to sentences based on their length so you can easily see the rhythm of your writing.

dict..setDesc(\"You can also toggle on and of: .setDesc("You can also toggle on and off from the command palette")
dict..setDesc(\"Disabled by default. When dis: .setDesc("Disabled by default. When disabled lines require a distinct end-of-sentence punctuation character to be highlighted")
